title: Create new group upon move to board
excerpt: It would be really useful to be able to create a new group when moving items too another board. So , for example, I might move items from our pipeline board to our “releases” board but I want to add these pulses to a new…

posts.author: tcmarimosa (Tom Crawley)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be really useful to be able to create a new group when moving items too another board. So , for example, I might move items from our pipeline board to our “releases” board but I want to add these pulses to a new group named by today’s date or the version number.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @tcmarimosa Tom - While you currently can’t do this with native monday․com automations, you can easily set this up with Integromat if it’s a high priority need for your team.

~ Deb Cinkus, PMP
